programme.title: Threads Of Gold
programme.desc: People In the jute mills near Kolkata, where harsh conditions persist, the threatened industry and its environmental toll unfold, raising the question of whether change can emerge from hardship.

programme.title: Threads Of Gold
programme.desc: People In the jute mills near Kolkata, where harsh conditions persist, the threatened industry and its environmental toll unfold, raising the question of whether change can emerge from hardship.

programme.title: Shepherds Around The World
programme.desc: People Mark Michel and his team embark on a global journey, immersing themselves in the lives of five diverse pastoral communities to explore their unique cultures, challenges, and enduring traditions.

programme.title: Four Seasons In The Forests
programme.desc: Nature Different creatures interact with nature; some appear and others hide each season, providing variety in the forest.

programme.title: The Battle For Survival In The Mediterranean
programme.desc: Nature Despite the dangers and threats to which marine creatures are exposed daily in the Mediterranean Sea due to factory and farm waste, these creatures struggle to survive through adaptation and biological evolution.

programme.title: In Love With Wild Horses
programme.desc: People An amazing journey through the enchanting nature of the North American continent, home to the Tsoulcotine people, known as the horse people because of their timeless and unique bond with horses.

programme.title: Arab Digital Community
programme.desc: Sciences Examines the impact of digital content on Arab society by following top content creators and how they shape the audience's awareness, questions, and values.

programme.title: Arabic Radio
programme.desc: History Delving into the history of Arab radio, highlighting its role in conveying the voice of the people, shaping their consciousness, and expressing their revolutions and demands. It also presents the role of radio in communication and preserving the heritage and art of the diverse Arab peoples.

programme.title: The Diabetes Battle In Australia
programme.desc: Fitness & Health An Australian physician and a physiologist are revolutionizing the world of diseases by presenting a scientifically based diet that can eliminate type 2 diabetes.

programme.title: Mysteries Of The Modern Science
programme.desc: Sciences Despite the progressive scientific developments in many fields, science remains baffled by unexpected cosmic phenomena such as solar storms. Research into many mysteries continues, but science must be prepared to deal with the discoveries' consequences.

programme.title: Protecting Sondong Cave
programme.desc: Nature A journey into the heart of Phong Nha-Ke Bang cave, located in northern Vietnam and listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site. This cave, the largest in the world, is an extraordinary marvel, featuring a lake, forest, clouds, and a rare ecosystem.

programme.title: Secrets Of Mount Olympus
programme.desc: Nature An exciting and enjoyable exploratory adventure in one of the strangest places in the world: Mount Olympus, once the home of the gods in Greek mythology. Now, scientists are working tirelessly to understand its strange phenomena.

programme.title: Santorini's Mystery
programme.desc: Nature Researchers from around the globe embark on a high-stakes mission to investigate the volatile volcano of Santorini, plunging beneath the sea to gather evidence and unravel questions that have intrigued historians and scientists for decades.

programme.title: Cheese From The Heart Of Nature
programme.desc: Nature Cheese makers strive to preserve the traditional flavor threatened by modern industry, passing down their age-old secrets through generations, believing that authentic taste is crafted by patient, loving hands, not machines.

programme.title: A Mosque's Story
programme.desc: History We travel through the mosques of the world to learn their untold stories, contemplate their designs and decorations, and explore through them the cultural and social transformations that they have witnessed over time.

programme.title: Crescent In The Face Of Nazism
programme.desc: History During the Nazi invasion of France, hundreds of Jews found refuge in the Grand Mosque of Paris and other Islamic institutions, where Muslims bravely risked their lives to shield them from capture and death.

programme.title: Arab Digital Community
programme.desc: Sciences Examines the impact of digital content on Arab society by following top content creators and how they shape the audience's awareness, questions, and values.

programme.title: The Impossible Journey
programme.desc: Nature In the heart of the icy wilderness, 28 brave adventurers battle for survival after being stranded. Tim Jarvis revives their impossible journey in a legendary challenge.

programme.title: The Impossible Journey
programme.desc: Nature In the heart of the icy wilderness, 28 brave adventurers battle for survival after being stranded. Tim Jarvis revives their impossible journey in a legendary challenge.

programme.title: Tahtaci People.. Children Of Forest
programme.desc: Nature In the Aegean forests in southern Turkey, a strange sect of loggers performs special rituals when cutting trees in season, where they pray and offer sacrifices because they believe that each tree has its own spirit.

programme.title: Secrets Deep In The Ice
programme.desc: Nature Scientists embark on a journey to the coldest and most frozen places, where they uncover mummified bodies, lost treasures, and mysterious viruses beneath layers of ice, using state-of-the-art tools and technologies that give us glimpses into the past.

programme.desc: Nature In the Aegean forests in southern Turkey, a strange sect of loggers performs special rituals when cutting trees in season, where they pray and offer sacrifices because they believe that each tree has its own spirit.

programme.title: Secrets Deep In The Ice
programme.desc: Nature Scientists embark on a journey to the coldest and most frozen places, where they uncover mummified bodies, lost treasures, and mysterious viruses beneath layers of ice, using state-of-the-art tools and technologies that give us glimpses into the past.

programme.title: Crescent In The Face Of Nazism
programme.desc: History During the Nazi invasion of France, hundreds of Jews found refuge in the Grand Mosque of Paris and other Islamic institutions, where Muslims bravely risked their lives to shield them from capture and death.

programme.title: Threads Of Gold
programme.desc: People In the jute mills near Kolkata, where harsh conditions persist, the threatened industry and its environmental toll unfold, raising the question of whether change can emerge from hardship.

programme.title: Four Seasons In The Forests
programme.desc: Nature Different creatures interact with nature; some appear and others hide each season, providing variety in the forest.

programme.title: The Battle For Survival In The Mediterranean

programme.title: In Love With Wild Horses

programme.title: Arab Digital Community

programme.title: Arabic Radio
programme.desc: History Delving into the history of Arab radio, highlighting its role in conveying the voice of the people, shaping their consciousness, and expressing their revolutions and demands. programme.title: The Diabetes Battle In Australia

programme.title: Mysteries Of The Modern Science
programme.desc: Sciences Despite the progressive scientific developments in many fields, science remains baffled by unexpected cosmic phenomena such as solar storms. Research into many mysteries continues, but science must be prepared to deal with the discoveries' consequences.

programme.title: Protecting Sondong Cave
programme.desc: Nature A journey into the heart of Phong Nha-Ke Bang cave, located in northern Vietnam and listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site. This cave, the largest in the world, is an extraordinary marvel, featuring a lake, forest, clouds, and a rare ecosystem.

programme.title: Secrets Of Mount Olympus
programme.desc: Nature An exciting and enjoyable exploratory adventure in one of the strangest places in the world: Mount Olympus, once the home of the gods in Greek mythology. Now, scientists are working tirelessly to understand its strange phenomena.

programme.title: Santorini's Mystery
programme.desc: Nature Researchers from around the globe embark on a high-stakes mission to investigate the volatile volcano of Santorini, plunging beneath the sea to gather evidence and unravel questions that have intrigued historians and scientists for decades.

programme.title: Cheese From The Heart Of Nature
programme.desc: Nature Cheese makers strive to preserve the traditional flavor threatened by modern industry, passing down their age-old secrets through generations, believing that authentic taste is crafted by patient, loving hands, not machines.

programme.desc: A woman gets back to her hometown to teach the importance of art, rekindling lost relationships. Madhuri Dixit, Darshan Jariwala.

programme.title: The Bitter Harvest
programme.desc: Zeba is forced to question everything when the man she depends on begins to change in unexpected ways. Caught between family pressure and emotional detachment, she struggles to hold her life together. Sanam Saeed, Emmad Irfani.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.title: Gaslight
programme.desc: Returning to her childhood home after a 15-year absence to visit her estranged father, Misha is shocked to learn that he is no longer there and has vanished without explanation. Sara Ali Khan, Vikrant Massey, Chitrangda Singh, Rahul Dev, Shataf Figar, Pavan Kirpalani, Pavan Kirpalani, Neha Sharma.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Highest Viewing Rate
programme.desc: Shaima's life takes a drastic turn when she becomes famous on social media. However, she quickly realizes that achieving fame online comes with a high cost. Salma Abu Deif, Layla Ahmed Zaher, Mohamed Mahmoud, Entesar, Farah Yousef, Yasmine Ahmed Kamel, Samar Taher.

programme.title: Haroun's Mother
programme.desc: A woman suffers from a lot of problems when she converts to Judaism in a society overwhelmed with racism. Hayat Al Fahed , Mohamed Gaber, Ahmed Al Jasmy , Abdel Mohsen Al Nemr, Soaad Ali, Faghriya Khamis, Fouad Ali, Mohamed Jamal Al Adl, Muhammad Shams, Hayat Al Fahad.

programme.title: Crystal
programme.desc: A severe conflict arises between Alia, a famous fashion designer, and Fay, the daughter of her house guard, who is trying to become like her. It gets worse when they both love the same person, Dr. Jawad. Mahmoud Nasr, Bamila Alkik, Stephanie Atala, Khaled Shabbat, Leen Gherra, Hakan Arslan, Lobna Meshlah, Pamela El kik.

programme.title: Complex 75
programme.desc: Relationships become intertwined between five families who live inside one of the upscale residential complexes in the city of Riyadh, and their dreams and ambitions control them, which may cause them problems. Tamer Bsyony, Ghada Al Molla, Abd El Monaem Riyad, Ingy Salama, Sarah El Harbi, Nada Ibrahim, Rana Gobran, Ghada Al Mulla, Rana Jobran.

programme.title: Lost In Someone's Love
programme.desc: Sai Joshi dreams of joining the Nagpur Medical College and becoming a doctor one day, but her steps are hindered when her family forces her to marry an IPS officer who is in love with another woman, so they make a secret deal that comforts both of them. Ayesha Singh, Neil Bhatt, Aishwarya Sharma Bhatt, Sanjivani Amit Takkar, Kishori Shahane, Jaydeep Sen, Rajesh Chawla.

programme.title: Toubah
programme.desc: Toubah, a former criminal, tries to start a new chapter in Port Said, but his peace is short-lived when a figure from his past resurfaces, threatening to destroy the life he's trying to rebuild. Amr Saad, Maged Elmasry, Diab , Saba Mubarak, Mostafa Abo Serea, Marwa Al-Azli, Asmaa Abou Al Yazeed, Ahmed Saleh, Ahmed Halabah, Maged Al Masry.

programme.title: The Pit
programme.desc: Despite leaving his love behind and starting fresh, the surprising presence of Yamac's mother disturbs all of his feelings asking him to return and aid the family legacy. Aras Bulut Iynemli, Erkan Kolcak Kostendil.

programme.title: The Family
programme.desc: Not only does coincidence bring together the mysterious businessman Aslan and psychotherapist Devin, but they also share the same psychological traumas caused by their families. It gets worse when they both love the same person, Dr. Jawad. Mahmoud Nasr, Bamila Alkik, Stephanie Atala, Khaled Shabbat, Leen Gherra, Hakan Arslan, Lobna Meshlah, Pamela El kik.

programme.title: The Family
programme.desc: Not only does coincidence bring together the mysterious businessman Aslan and psychotherapist Devin, but they also share the same psychological traumas caused by their families. Therefore, they try to establish a life together despite the suffering. Kivanç Tatlitug, Serenay Sarikaya, Nur Surer, Nejat Isler, Canan Erguder, Ahmet Katiksiz, Hakan Bonomo, Kivanc Tatlitug.

programme.title: Super Miro
programme.desc: Despite her naivete', Journalist Amira Taftaf decides to test her true strength by thwarting the evil deeds of a dangerous gang with the help of her inventor friend, which makes her the talk of the town. Amy Samir Ghanem, Hamdy Al Merghany.

programme.title: Haroun's Mother
programme.desc: A woman suffers from a lot of problems when she converts to Judaism in a society overwhelmed with racism. Hayat Al Fahed , Mohamed Gaber, Ahmed Al Jasmy , Abdel Mohsen Al Nemr, Soaad Ali, Faghriya Khamis, Fouad Ali, Mohamed Jamal Al Adl, Muhammad Shams, Hayat Al Fahad.

programme.title: Crystal

programme.title: Complex 75
programme.desc: Relationships become intertwined between five families who live inside one of the upscale residential complexes in the city of Riyadh, and their dreams and ambitions control them, which may cause them problems. Tamer Bsyony, Ghada Al Molla, Abd El Monaem Riyad, Ingy Salama, Sarah El Harbi, Nada Ibrahim, Rana Gobran, Ghada Al Mulla, Rana Jobran.

programme.title: Lost In Someone's Love
programme.desc: Sai Joshi dreams of joining the Nagpur Medical College and becoming a doctor one day, but her steps are hindered when her family forces her to marry an IPS officer who is in love with another woman, so they make a secret deal that comforts both of them. Ayesha Singh, Neil Bhatt, Aishwarya Sharma Bhatt, Sanjivani Amit Takkar, Kishori Shahane, Jaydeep Sen, Rajesh Chawla.

programme.title: Toubah
programme.desc: Toubah, a former criminal, tries to start a new chapter in Port Said, but his peace is short-lived when a figure from his past resurfaces, threatening to destroy the life he's trying to rebuild. Amr Saad, Maged Elmasry, Diab , Saba Mubarak, Mostafa Abo Serea, Marwa Al-Azli, Asmaa Abou Al Yazeed, Ahmed Saleh, Ahmed Halabah, Maged Al Masry.

programme.title: The Pit
programme.desc: Despite leaving his love behind and starting fresh, the surprising presence of Yamac's mother disturbs all of his feelings asking him to return and aid the family legacy. Aras Bulut Iynemli, Erkan Kolcak Kostendil.

programme.title: Wild Heart
programme.desc: Kidnapped from his wealthy family as a child, Yaman grows up on the streets, forming close bonds along the way. Halit Özgür Sari, Yurdaer Okur, Dolunay Soysert, Bertan Asllani, Cagatay Tosun, Hilal Yildiz, Halit Ozgur Sari, Simay Barlas.

programme.desc: S2 E22 تتوفى يسرية وتحزن عليها أمل حزناً شديداً، ويقوم المحامي لاحقاً بتسليم الوصية للأخيرة الأمر الذي يغضب مديحة وسالم، بينما تحاول بسمة جذب عزيز لصالحها.
programme.title: ولاد تسعة موس

programme.desc: S2 E23 تستمر شكوك إحسان حول يارا خاصة بعد عثورها على دليل يثبت وصول الأخيرة يوم وقوع الحادث وليس بعده كما أقنعت الجميع، فيما يكتشف حاتم حمل رحاب.
programme.title: ولاد تسعة موس

programme.desc: S2 E24 يقوم حاتم بتطليق هالة، فيما ينتهي المطاف بشعبان خلف قضبان السجن وتحاول إحسان استئناف الحكم. أما يارا، فتسافر إلى لبنان في محاولة لإقناع عمتها بفسخ خطوبتها بأنور.
programme.title: ولاد تسعة موس

programme.desc: S2 E25 تقوم يارا باتهام إحسان بالسرقة وتطردها من العمل، وتواجه كريم لاحقاً بشأن علاقته بنهى، بينما يكتشف عمرو حقيقة محامي خاله المدعو فهمي، فيما يبدأ عزيز بالتخلي عن بسمة.
programme.title: ولاد تسعة موس

programme.title: ولي العهد الموس

Özgü Namal, Engin Altan Düzyatan, Gaye Gürsel, Emin Gürsoy, Merve Ates, Ketche , Burak Göral, Ozgu Namal, Engin Altan Duzyatan.

programme.title: Zee Connect Bil Arabi
programme.desc: Presenting the latest celebrity news and interviews, along with reports on art, fashion, and lifestyle, through a range of segments that cover entertainment events and current developments.

programme.desc: Two officers cooperate to use their forensic skills to uncover the identity of a brutal murderer who committed a series of crimes by targeting young girls. Tovino Thomas, Mamta Mohandas, Saiju Kurup, Reba Monica John, Renji Panicker, Anas Khan, Akhil Paul, P. Shijith.
